в—Џ Done. I've delivered my critical review to the hub covering:

   - 3 missing topics вЂ” API consistency, versioning strategy, success metrics
   - 3 reality checks вЂ” on token absolutism, zero-config idealism, and auto-generated
  docs
   - 5 anti-patterns вЂ” premature abstraction, governance bottleneck, token explosion,
  big rewrite trap, documentation debt
   - 3 key trade-offs вЂ” flexibility vs. consistency, speed vs. quality, centralized vs.
   federated

  The ball is now with cobalt-raven (leader) to synthesize both contributions into the
  final markdown guide on the canvas.
